title: Pathfinder project config
description: Configuration for Pathfinder UI test coverage mapping. Lives at <testDir>/pathfinder/config.json. All fields are optional — Pathfinder auto-detects sensible defaults.

framework.description: UI test framework. Auto-detected if omitted.

testDir.description: Directory containing UI tests, relative to project root.

storageState.description: Path to a saved auth state (e.g. Playwright storageState).

coverage.description: How coverage is scored and reported.

thresholds.description: Percent cutoffs for the 🟢/🟡/🔴 status used by coverage-score.py and generate-diagrams.py.

countPartialAsTested.description: If true, steps marked "partial" count toward the coverage percentage.

failUnder.description: If set, coverage-score.py exits non-zero when overall coverage is below this percent (for CI gating). Null disables the gate.

ignore.description: Glob patterns (relative to project root) to skip when crawling code and scanning tests, e.g. "**/admin/**".

commands.description: Command overrides the agent should use instead of guessing.

test.description: Command to run the UI test suite (e.g. "npx playwright test", "xcodebuild test ...").

strategy.description: Whether generated tests prefer role/label selectors or test-id selectors.

testIdAttribute.description: Test-id attribute used in this project (e.g. data-testid, data-cy, testID).
